dataset: NinjaTrader 8 Time & Sales data for SPY and AAPL

pi_items.source: Yahoo Finance, TradingView, NASDAQ official sources - SPY is SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust, AAPL is Apple Inc.

NinjaTrader 8 official documentation (https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpGuides/nt8/timeandsales_properties.htm) - 'Maximum items to display' sets number of display rows. 100 is a valid positive integer within NinjaTrader's configuration range.
NinjaTrader 8 official documentation and help guides confirm 'Time & Sales' (TimeAndSales) is a standard window type for monitoring order flow
Standard NinjaTrader 8 installation path observed in environment configuration (env.json) and task setup scripts (setup_task.ps1 files in other tasks)

Environment description claims 'real Yahoo Finance data (SPY, AAPL, MSFT 2023-2024)'. Data files contain 502 lines each with OHLCV format for dates 2023-01-03 to 2024-12-31. However, spot-check of AAPL closing price 125.07 on 2023-01-03 does not match verified price of 123.21 from multiple sources.
File system inspection: SPY.Last.txt, AAPL.Last.txt, MSFT.Last.txt each with 502 lines
File inspection: first line 20230103, last line 20241231
File system inspection: Script file does not exist at task directory
File system inspection: Script file does not exist at task directory

privileged_info_summary: The task configures Time & Sales windows for real trading instruments: SPY (SPDR S&P 500 ETF) and AAPL (Apple Inc., NASDAQ:AAPL). The target row count of 100 is a valid configuration for NinjaTrader 8's 'Maximum items to display' property in Time & Sales windows. The workspace directory C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces is the standard NinjaTrader 8 workspace location. Historical price data files exist for both instruments covering 2023-2024 from Yahoo Finance, though price verification revealed potential discrepancies in the data. Critical issue: The setup_task.ps1 and export_result.ps1 scripts referenced in task.json hooks do not exist, which would prevent task execution.
